creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu Jun 27 12:51:07 2013
New Revision: 321887
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321887

Log:
  textproc/trang: update to 2009.11.11
  
  - Update to 2009.11.11
  - NOPORTDOCS -> PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS
  
  PR:		ports/179006
  Submitted by:	Anton Yuzhaninov <ayuzhaninov openstat.ru>
  Approved by:	maintainer (timeout)

Modified:
  head/textproc/trang/Makefile
  head/textproc/trang/distinfo

Modified: head/textproc/trang/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/trang/Makefile	Thu Jun 27 12:38:11 2013	(r321886)
+++ head/textproc/trang/Makefile	Thu Jun 27 12:51:07 2013	(r321887)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	trang
-PORTVERSION=	2008.10.28
+PORTVERSION=	2009.11.11
 CATEGORIES=	textproc java
 MASTER_SITES=	http://jing-trang.googlecode.com/files/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:S/.//g}
@@ -15,19 +15,21 @@ USE_JAVA=	yes
 JAVA_VERSION=	1.6+
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 PORTDOCS=	copying.txt trang-manual.html
-.endif
 
 SUB_FILES=	trang.sh
 PLIST_FILES=	%%JAVAJARDIR%%/trang.jar bin/trang
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/trang.jar ${JAVAJARDIR}
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/trang.sh ${PREFIX}/bin/trang
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	cd ${WRKSRC}; ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/textproc/trang/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/trang/distinfo	Thu Jun 27 12:38:11 2013	(r321886)
+++ head/textproc/trang/distinfo	Thu Jun 27 12:51:07 2013	(r321887)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (trang-20081028.zip) = 1e46e2554f40ba2595cb1383dc57c0857acc1fdcf84e2fd9948936c6065f1cff
-SIZE (trang-20081028.zip) = 925725
+SHA256 (trang-20091111.zip) = d8a3f034f9918ebe5b265aafeadbee6729ddda5732cfc368e2c30b3b8c0ca598
+SIZE (trang-20091111.zip) = 1079534
